rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees involving ports
Stateful equations in AGREE should use initialized temporal recurrence patterns
AGREE guarantees must relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only subcomponent paths
generic_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for branching and conditional logic in contracts
Place component type annexes in the component type scope for assumptions and guarantees
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible and properly typed
Generated AGREE contracts should use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Branching logic in AGREE uses nested if ... then ... else expressions
Guarantees should reference only visible features or declared helpers in the same annex
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
